title: Grouped OpenLinks
description: Grouped example with sleek starter themes

footer.description:
OpenLinks is a personal, free, open source, version-controlled links site.
Fork it, customize JSON, and publish fast.

prompt.title: Create your own OpenLinks site
prompt.explanation: Paste this bootstrap prompt into OpenClaw, Claude, or Codex to create a new OpenLinks site from this repository.
prompt.text: Follow docs/openclaw-bootstrap.md exactly for this repository. Execute Required Execution Policy, End-to-End OpenClaw Sequence, Automation and Identity Confirmation Rule, Social Discovery and Inference Contract, Deployment Verification Contract, Structured URL Reporting Schema, README Deploy URL Marker-Block Contract, and Final Output Contract exactly as written. If an existing setup is detected, ask the single route-confirmation and switch to docs/openclaw-update-crud.md when selected.
